title: Tensura EP Scaling
description:
Disclaimer: No Orc's were harmed in the making of this mod
Allows Various Items to scale and evolve based on EP from the Tensura Reincarnated Mod
body:
# --[[COMPATIBILITY]]--
### --[NeoForge]--
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks)
- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
- Apotheosis
- [Spartan Weaponry (Unofficial)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-weaponry-unofficial)
- [Spartan Shields (Unofficial)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-shields-unofficial)

### --[Fabric]--
- [Sophisticated Backpacks (Unofficial Port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port))
- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)

# --[[PROGRESSION]]--
## EP Values are Displayed as (StartingEP, MaxEP)
### --[Bone Golems]--
- Low Magisteel -> High Magisteel -> Pure Magisteel -> Mithril -> Adamantite -> Hihiirokane
- Orichalcum -> Hihiirokane

### --[Armor]--
- Gold -> Chainmail -> Diamond -> Netherite -> Low Magisteel

### --[Tools/Weapons (Includes Low Tier Tensura Weapons)]--
- Wood -> Stone -> Iron -> Gold -> Diamond -> Netherite -> Low Magisteel
- Kunai -> Low MagiSteel Kunai
- Trident -> Vortex Spear
- Goblin Club -> Kanabo
- Armorsaurus Shield -> Tempest Scale Shield
- Short Bow -> Short Spider Bow
- Long Bow -> Long Spider Bow
- War Bow -> War Spider Bow

### --[Items that Gain EP But Don't Evolve]--
- Shears
- Flint and Steel
- Fishing Rod
- Mace

### --[Sophisticated Backpacks]--
- Backpack(0,550) -> Copper(550,1250) -> Iron(1250,3250) -> Gold(3250,6500) -> Diamond(6.5K,12K) -> Netherite(12K,100K)

### --[Simply Swords]--
- Iron(1.5k,3k) -> Gold(3k,4.5k) -> Diamond(4.5k,6k) -> Netherite(6k,12k) -> Runic(12k,30k)
- Uniques(0,65k)
- Dormant Relic(0,30k)
- Righteous Relic(0,30k) -> Sun Fire(30k,65k)
- Tainted Relic(0,30k) -> Harbinger(30k,65k)
- Slumbering LichBlade(0,15k) -> Waking LichBlade(15k,30k) -> Awakened LichBlade(30k,65k)

### --[Spartan Shields Unofficial]--
- Wood(0,750) -> Stone(750,1.5k) -> Copper(1.5k,3k) -> Iron(3k,4.5k) -> Gold(4.5k,6k) -> Diamond(6k,8k) -> Netherite(8k,20k)

### --[Spartan Weaponry Unofficial]--
- Wood(0,750) -> Stone(750,1.5k) -> Copper(1.5k,3k) -> Iron(3k,6k) -> Gold(6k,8k) -> Diamond(8k,16k) -> Netherite(16k,30k)
- Club(0,1.5k) -> Studded Club(1.5k,3k)
- Cestus(0,1.5k) -> Studded Cestus(1.5k,3k)
